name: Almost Better Than Sex Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9-inch x 13-inch pan.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to the package instructions; pour into the prepared pan.
4. Bake for about 10 minutes, then sprinkle with chocolate chips.
5. Continue baking until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Once the cake is done and still warm, poke holes all over it using the handle of a wooden spoon.
7. Pour the sweetened condensed milk over the cake.
8. Let cool completely.
9. Spread caramel sauce evenly over the top.
10. Add whipped topping.
11. Sprinkle crushed candy bars on top.
